rationale.R1.6: The text has been revised to improve writing polish by fixing tense inconsistencies, untangling run-on sentences, and flagging evidence-claim gaps.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not explicitly disclose uncertainty for all claims; only the need for further analysis is mentioned.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (treating verbal hedges as politeness markers rather than signals of epistemic uncertainty) and suggests implications for conversational interface design.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
